methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: ERC-20 reserves held by Pair contracts (token0/token1 balances)
LP tokens minted by Pair (Pair.totalSupply/balanceOf) representing claims on reserves
Accumulated swap fees escrowed in PairFees contracts (token0/token1 balances held by PairFees)
Staking fee buckets in PairFees (toStake0/toStake1) destined for stakingFeeHandler
Referral fee flows paid from Pair to dibs address (PairFactory.dibs)
Reward tokens held by GaugeV2 for emissions distribution (rewardToken balance in GaugeV2)
Staked LP tokens held by GaugeV2 (TOKEN balance held by GaugeV2; internal accounting _totalSupply/_balances)
Extra rewards held by GaugeExtraRewarder (rewardToken balance in GaugeExtraRewarder)
ETH/AVAX handled by RouterV2 (via WETH/WAVAX wrapping) and WAVAX contract balance
Tokens temporarily custodied by RouterV2 during concentrated (Algebra) swaps (tokens held by RouterV2 prior to calling swapRouter)
Algebra pool creation / configuration authority via CustomPoolDeployer affecting fee recipient/fee share/plugin
Genesis-related stake deposits into GaugeV2 via depositsForGenesis (LP moved from genesisPool to GaugeV2)
state_assets: Pair AMM core state: reserve0, reserve1, blockTimestampLast
Pair oracle/TWAP state: observations[], reserve0CumulativeLast, reserve1CumulativeLast
Pair LP token ledger: totalSupply, balanceOf, allowance, nonces (permit)
Pair fee-index accounting: index0/index1, supplyIndex0/supplyIndex1, claimable0/claimable1
PairFactory registry state: getPair mapping, allPairs array, isPair mapping, isGenesis mapping
PairFactory fee configuration: stableFee, volatileFee, stakingNFTFee, MAX_REFERRAL_FEE, customFees, customReferralFees
PairFactory operational state: isPaused, dibs, stakingFeeHandler, genesisManager, pairGenerator
PairFactory role/flow state: feeManager, pendingFeeManager, Ownable owner
GaugeV2 staking state: _totalSupply, _balances, maturityTime (including genesisPool-derived balances via IGenesisPool)
GaugeV2 reward distribution state: DURATION, _periodFinish, rewardRate, lastUpdateTime, rewardPerTokenStored, userRewardPerTokenPaid, rewards
GaugeV2 configuration: DISTRIBUTION, VE, genesisPool, genesisManager, gaugeRewarder, internal_bribe, external_bribe, emergency, isForPair
RouterV2 configuration: swapRouter, algebraFactory, quoterV2, algebraPoolAPIStorage, owner
TradeHelper immutables: factory, pairCodeHash; routing computations
CustomPoolDeployer config: entryPoint, plugin, tickSpacing, algebraPoolAPIStorage, algebraFeeRecipient, algebraFeeManager, algebraFeeShare, factories; authorizedAccounts; poolToPlugin
BlackholePairAPIV2 config/state: owner, voter, gaugeManager, routerV2, pairFactory, algebraFactory, quoterV2, algebraPoolAPIStorage, underlyingToken
privilege_assets: PairFactory OwnableUpgradeable.owner (pause control via setPause; implicit upgrade admin via proxy admin if any)
PairFactory feeManager role (onlyManager) controlling fees, dibs, staking fee handler, genesisManager, genesis status
GaugeV2 owner (can change DISTRIBUTION, gaugeRewarder, internal_bribe, genesisManager, and toggle emergency mode)
GaugeV2 DISTRIBUTION authority (onlyDistribution can call notifyRewardAmount and getReward(address _user) privileged harvest path)
GaugeV2 genesisPool authority (onlyGenesisPool can call depositsForGenesis)
GaugeFactory OwnableUpgradeable.owner and GAUGE_ADMIN role via PermissionsRegistry (can batch-set gauge parameters through IGauge interface)
GaugeFactory emergencyCouncil via PermissionsRegistry (can activate/stop emergency on arbitrary gauges)
CustomPoolDeployer owner/authorizedAccounts (can set plugin/fee/communityFee/config on Algebra pools; can re-point factories)
reputation_assets: Voting weights used for gauge emissions (voter.weights(pair) queried by BlackholePairAPIV2)
Bribe incentive visibility and amounts (IBribeAPI tokenRewardsPerEpoch used by BlackholePairAPIV2)
Gauge emission rate and rewardForDuration (queried via IGaugeAPI in BlackholePairAPIV2)
Protocol routing/price quoting integrity (RouterV2 quoting + BlackholePairAPIV2 route discovery affects UX and perceived fair pricing)

system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: Pair implements IPair (no OZ inheritance). PairFactory inherits OwnableUpgradeable. GaugeV2 inherits ReentrancyGuard and Ownable. GaugeFactory inherits OwnableUpgradeable. GaugeExtraRewarder inherits Ownable. CustomPoolDeployer inherits Ownable. BlackholePairAPIV2 inherits Initializable. RouterV2/GlobalRouter/TradeHelper/PairGenerator/WAVAX are standalone.
external_dependencies: OpenZeppelin: OwnableUpgradeable, Initializable, Ownable, ReentrancyGuard, SafeERC20, IERC20 (OZ), SafeMath (unused/legacy in GlobalRouter)
CryptoAlgebra: integral-periphery (IQuoterV2, ISwapRouter, IAlgebraCustomPoolEntryPoint), integral-core (IAlgebraPool, IAlgebraFactory, IAlgebraCommunityVault)
External protocol contracts via interfaces: Bribe, Voter, VotingEscrow, GaugeManager, PermissionsRegistry, GenesisPool
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: PairFactory and GaugeFactory are upgradeable via Initializable/OwnableUpgradeable (proxy expected but not shown). BlackholePairAPIV2 is upgradeable via Initializable (proxy expected but not shown). Other contracts are non-upgradeable deployments. No Diamond pattern present.
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Mix of role-based and owner-based controls: PairFactory uses OwnableUpgradeable.owner for pausing and feeManager (onlyManager) for fee params; GaugeV2 uses Ownable for admin plus separate DISTRIBUTION (onlyDistribution) and genesisManager/genesisPool roles; GaugeFactory uses OwnableUpgradeable plus PermissionsRegistry roles (GAUGE_ADMIN, emergencyCouncil); RouterV2 uses a simple owner address (not OZ Ownable); CustomPoolDeployer uses Ownable plus authorizedAccounts; BlackholePairAPIV2 uses a simple owner variable (not OZ Ownable) and Initializable initializer.

state_changes: PairFees token balances (via transfers to fees)

upgradeability_surface.notes: OwnableUpgradeable/Initializable suggests proxy deployment; implementation constructor is empty. Must ensure initialize() called once and implementation is not left initializable in production (disableInitializers not shown).
OwnableUpgradeable/Initializable suggests proxy deployment; createGauge is permissionless regardless of roles.
Initializable with custom owner variable (not OZ Ownable). Ensure initialize() cannot be called on implementation and that proxy admin separation is handled externally.
Deployed via CREATE2 from PairGenerator; no proxy.
Non-upgradeable; has mutable owner and critical mutable external dependency addresses.
Non-upgradeable; owner has strong admin powers; DISTRIBUTION is privileged.
Non-upgradeable. createCustomPool is permissionless and performs powerful configuration on new Algebra pools (fee receiver/share/manager/plugin).
